title: Codecrafter Resource Pack
description: This is the resource pack required for a few of our plugins.
body:
# Plugin's Resource Pack

This pack contains all the custom assets needed to enhance our server plugins.

**Key Features:**
* several Resource Pack's, for each plugin.
* every plugin has its own Resource Pack, you can use several packs, also if the right plugin isnt installed on the server.

Custom textures created by **Gecko736, LAPDK66**

---

# Please download the right recourse pack.
go to the versions Tab and donwload the one you need.

---

**Plugins**
* https://modrinth.com/plugin/magicwandscc
* https://modrinth.com/plugin/reapers-scythe
